name: grievance-server
description: AI Grievance Intelligence System - Express.js Backend

scripts.prestart: powershell -Command '$p=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess); if($p){ Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }'
